title: Crafting Improved
description: Improves crafting in every way possible.
body: # Crafting Improved ### About A simple mod that adds new crafting recipes and modifys some existing ones. Use this if you think certain minecraft crafting recipes are unbalanced. I know there are already *plenty* of other data packs and mods just like this but I really think that mine is better than the ones I've seen. ### Tips - I've added things you must do to unlock the recipes in the recipe book. (mostly getting items that you need to craft the thing) - To find all recipes added on a world where you have access you cheats use this command that gives you every recipe in the game, then search the in game recipe book for recipes that you see in the list at the bottom of this description. ``` /recipe give @s * ``` ### Installation (for datapack) Installed just like any other datapack. A tutorial on how to do that can be found on the minecraft wiki here. ### Recipes *As of version 2.1* - Adds recipes for chainmail armor. - Adds recipes for all kinds of horse armor along with changing the leather horse armor recipe to have a better shape. - Brings back the old recipe for enchanted golden apple. (see recipe in [gallery](https://modrinth.com/project/crafting-improved/gallery)) - Adds crafting recipe for heavy core. - Adds crafting recipe for name tag. - Adds crafting recipe for totem of undying. - Adds crafting recipe for trident. (see recipe in [gallery](https://modrinth.com/project/crafting-improved/gallery)) - Adds furnace recipe to turn rotten flesh into leather. - Adds crafting recipe to turn stone into cobblestone via stonecutter. - Adds crafting recipe for red mushroom block. - Adds crafting recipe for brown mushroom block. - Adds crafting recipe for red mushroom. - Adds crafting recipe for brown mushroom. - Adds crafting recipe for cobweb. - Adds crafting recipe for string - Adds crafting recipe for bell. - Adds secondary crafting recipe for netherite upgrade. - Changes all spear recipes to be more realistic. - Adds duplication recipe for making a new dragon egg.
